text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Admire Vega has a dance class, so I go to
see how she's faring.
Marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes! Your tap dancing just now was
marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh, really? I thought you were dancing with
me. ☆

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...How? My choreography is completely different.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
That doesn't matter. ☆ The dances were still
marvelous. ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Look! Try it once more! This time, while saying the
word marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Then you'll receive marvelous power, and your dance moves will be all the more marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Say it with me now... Maaarvelous! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
No way! If that's what it takes to improve my
dancing, then spare me the torture.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
No way! If that's what it takes to improve my
dancing, then spare me the torture.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh! A marvelous idea! ☆ Well then, Ayabe, let's
do one more song!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Do whatever you want. I'm going to practice my choreography.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Nice steps! Marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Next is a tap. Marvelous! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on... Give me a break!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she voices her dissatisfaction, her
dancing, strangely, is improving. She appears to
be surprised as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday's live performances are always
praised for their power and crisp execution. This
could be the secret.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...But I won't keep doing it if I don't see quick
results.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Nice steps! Marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Nice... steps. Marvelous...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Hm? Why am I suddenly matching the rhythm
more easily? Is it because I'm more focused on the
steps?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I've got the hang of it. I'm not doing that again, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From this day on, her dance moves become much
sharper.
